_comment: Seed reference library of common plasmid vector parts for auto-annotation (issue #42). Flat, easy to extend — community additions welcome. Coding parts carry a `translation` that is verified against the DNA in tests. Longer ORF parts (origins of replication, resistance markers, fluorescent proteins) are a natural extension: add them here with an exact GenBank-sourced sequence.

parts.name: T7 promoter
parts.source: Bacteriophage T7 RNA polymerase consensus promoter (-17..+1); e.g. pET vectors

parts.name: T3 promoter
parts.source: Bacteriophage T3 RNA polymerase promoter; e.g. pBluescript

parts.name: SP6 promoter
parts.source: Bacteriophage SP6 RNA polymerase promoter; e.g. pGEM/pCR vectors

parts.name: lac operator
parts.source: T7lac operator (LacI binding site) used in pET vectors to suppress leaky expression

parts.name: RBS (T7 gene 10)
parts.source: T7 gene 10 Shine-Dalgarno ribosome binding site; pET translation initiation

parts.name: T7 terminator
parts.source: Bacteriophage T7 T-phi transcription terminator; pET vectors

parts.name: M13 fwd primer
parts.source: M13/pUC (-20) forward sequencing primer binding site

parts.name: M13 rev primer
parts.source: M13/pUC reverse sequencing primer binding site

parts.name: 6xHis tag
parts.source: Hexahistidine purification tag (one common CAC codon usage)

parts.name: HA tag
parts.source: Influenza hemagglutinin (HA) epitope tag; peptide YPYDVPDYA

parts.name: SV40 NLS
parts.source: SV40 large T antigen nuclear localization signal; peptide PKKKRKV

parts.name: TEV protease site
parts.source: Tobacco etch virus (TEV) protease cleavage site; peptide ENLYFQG

parts.name: Factor Xa site
parts.source: Factor Xa protease cleavage site; peptide IEGR
